description_long: This is a life-sized adult figure dressed in a full motocross or dirt bike riding outfit, featuring a long-sleeved jersey and matching pants with bold, angular patterns. The clothing is form-fitting and appears to be made from synthetic, abrasion-resistant materials, with reinforced areas on the knees, elbows, and shins for added protection. The gloves are padded and designed for grip, while the boots are high, sturdy, and heavily armored, suitable for off-road riding. The suit is adorned with visible branding and stylized text, adding to its sporty and professional appearance. The figure's head is missing, but the neck area is covered by the high collar of the jersey. The overall look is dynamic and athletic, suggesting the wearer is prepared for high-intensity urban or recreational activity.
description: A headless adult figure in a full motocross riding outfit, including armored boots, gloves, and a reinforced jersey and pants with bold patterns and branding.
description_view_0: Back view showing the full rear of the jersey and pants, with visible branding on the lower back and arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the armored boots, gloves, and the fitted nature of the outfit.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the chest, knee reinforcements, and the detailed design of the gloves and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the outfit, including the arm and leg protection.
attribute_clothing_type: motocross riding suit with armored boots, gloves, and reinforced athletic wear
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
